---
agent: bubbles.security
---

Run security and compliance analysis: threat modeling, dependency vulnerability scanning, OWASP Top 10 code review, auth/authz verification. Produces structured findings mapped to OWASP categories with severity rankings and remediation guidance. Updates scope artifacts with security-specific DoD items.

Bug folders (`specs/**/bugs/BUG-*`) are supported and will be treated as bug work (bug artifacts gate + bug-scoped DoD).
